hero.title: BHUMI WARIH
hero.meta: Registered on CIVD System: SPDA Number 73970/EMP/2024
hero.headline:
SAFE Marine Operations,
SECURE Maritime Investments

sections.title: Bhumi Warih is an Indonesian based company specializing in meteorological and oceanographic (Metocean) analysis.
sections.body: Our knowledge and experience have been acquired from specialized services in the maritime industry since 2010, with strong access and local understanding across South East Asia.

sections.title: Offshore and Coastal Navigation Decision Making
sections.description: Make informed decisions through accurate analysis and expert guidance, for safer operations, optimized performance, and cost-efficient protection of marine assets.

items.title: MetOcean Design Criteria
items.description: Extreme Value Analysis. Numerical Simulation. Ocean, Climate and Weather Analysis

items.title: MetOcean DSS
items.description: Marine Sea State Prediction. Weather Forecast. Tow Route Forecast. Weather Window.

items.title: Extended Services
items.description: Our team can provide customized services tailored for your specific needs in maritime industry.

sections.title: Integrated Marine Intelligence & Business Insight Ecosystem
sections.body: The collaboration between oceanographic science, geospatial engineering, and GeoAI platforms enhances research capabilities, R&D, and predictive models for national maritime disasters and climate.

sections.title: Bringing Clarity Across Industries
sections.description: Assess and align the critical elements needed in various maritime industry. Our team possesses a strong knowledge of South East Asian waters that brings clarity to any maritime industry’s problem at any stage of development.

items.title: Oil & Gas
items.copy: Assist with the necessary information on atmospheric and oceanographic conditions on our client working sites. Metocean data and analysis will enable our clients’ engineers to refine plans with better cost conformity.

items.title: Port and Harbor
items.copy: Develop an optimized port and harbor design that meets economic and technical viability criteria including design protection, engineering efficiency, and maintainability.
items: Environmental study at port and harbour area

items.title: Other Maritime Industry
items.copy: Bring clarity to any maritime industry problem at any stage. Before planning any maritime development, we need to understand the natural environment surrounding the project location.

sections.note: Insight page and article content will be extracted later.
